name: Ratings (Dev)
description: Professional rating system for Jellyfin. Rate media with 1-10 stars, view detailed user ratings on hover, and see rating badges on media cards. Optimized for large libraries with lazy loading.
overview: Comprehensive rating plugin with star-based UI, average ratings display, detailed user rating popups, and performance-optimized card overlays for large media libraries.

versions.changelog: Profile polish. Hover any favorite poster to see a popup with the full title, year and description (so you can recognise titles without opening them). Fixed the profile header: when you set a GIF/video background, your name and details no longer look greyed out - they stay bright and readable over the video.

Profile additions and two fixes. You can now add films/shows that are NOT yet on the server to your profile rows - hover one to reveal a Request button, or click it for a reminder to request it. Edit Profile now lets you upload your own looping GIF or video to show behind your name and picture. Fixes: the rating number no longer lingers on a star after you stop hovering, and deleting a duplicate now actually removes the file so it no longer comes back after a library scan.

Faster Latest Media and a couple of nice touches. Reworked the recent-media lookups so the 'Latest Media' panel and browsing load quicker on large libraries. When you hover the rating stars, the number now appears inside the star you're pointing at, with a small pop animation. Added an admin option to show or hide the rating badge on poster cards - turning it off (or turning ratings off) now removes the badges right away instead of leaving old ones behind.

Speed and reliability improvements. Made the 'Latest Media' panel and general browsing noticeably faster on large libraries by removing heavy background work that ran every minute. Fixed old movies and shows sometimes appearing as 'newly added' when they were not - now only genuinely new media triggers a notification, and the same item is never announced twice (even after a server restart). Fixed custom sorting showing no cards when several folders are combined into one library view.

Fixed the Duplicates tool wrongly flagging whole TV shows as duplicates. It was treating every episode of a series as a copy of the same thing (e.g. 705 'copies' of The Simpsons). Now it only groups true duplicates - the same episode (or movie) appearing more than once - so different episodes are no longer shown as duplicates.
Faster loading. The plugin's add-on is now packaged more compactly (about a third smaller), so it downloads and starts a bit quicker. No features change.

Faster page loads. The plugin's add-on now loads from your browser's cache instead of downloading again every time you open a page, so your library opens quicker after the first visit. Nothing else changes.
Security: removed the unused standalone profile page that triggered several CodeQL warnings. The in-app profile and everything else are unchanged.

Real fix for favorites not saving: the profile loads favorites from the server's PascalCase JSON, but the UI read camelCase, so rows loaded EMPTY and the next save overwrote the saved items. Favorites are now normalized on load. Also added a reliable drop zone so you can drag a poster from Recent Activity onto a row (including the + slot).

Favorites finally save reliably (removed a save-success snapshot overwrite that dropped items added while a save was in flight). Drag-to-reorder and add/remove now update only the affected row instead of reloading the whole profile, and you can drag a poster from Recent Activity straight into a favorites row.

Fixed favorites not saving (debounced saves prevent a clobber race that wiped items); favorite-row posters now load from the current server address (fixes blank posters via reverse proxy/domain); fixed the profile Like 404 (wrong route); added the plugin version to the dashboard header.

Profile stats now count rated films/shows (was 0). Dashboard: added Revision History and fixed list number alignment. Media picker: added 'Show all (random)' so you can add any media to rows, not just rated. Added favorites-save diagnostics to track down the not-saving issue.

Faster profile load (Stats no longer runs a query per series - was the main ~5s cause). Add-to-row chooser now shows real row names. Removed the confusing Lists tab/stat/sidebar. Favorites save now surfaces errors instead of failing silently.

Media picker now respects the category tab (Movies/Series/etc.) when sorting by My Ratings - no longer always shows movies. Favorite rows scroll with transparent hover arrows instead of a scrollbar. Replaced mirror reflections with clean drop shadows. Faster profile load: the overview now fetches ratings once and reuses them across distribution/posters/reviews/activity.

Add-a-film now searches the full external catalog via TMDB (paste a free TMDB Read Access Token in plugin settings) - results not on your server can be requested in one click; server results get a '+ Add' button to add to a chosen favorites row (or a new row). Drag-and-drop to reorder films within a favorites row. Fixed the Lists 404 (wrong route) so the Lists count works. Fixed a broken favorites remove button.

Profile bug fixes: much faster load (single batched library query instead of hundreds of per-item lookups), Reviews count now calculated, you show as Online on your own profile, live WebSocket online-status updates (no reopen needed), the three-dot menu popup positioned correctly, and review like/dislike buttons now work.

Profile polish: lock background-page scrolling while the profile is open (no more scroll bleed), plus a big visual upgrade - poster mirror reflections, glassmorphism side panels, glowing stars/accents, gradient avatar/title, smoother hover/press animations, and a background picker (Aurora/Sunset/Emerald/Minimal, remembered per browser). Note: full IMDb-style external catalog search is coming next and will need a free TMDB API key.

Profile redesign: new two-column Letterboxd-style Overview with a right sidebar (Add-a-film search/request, stats, ratings histogram, lists, activity), real poster strip and recent reviews, an 'Add a film' box that searches your server (click to watch) or requests missing titles by name/IMDb, plus hover/press animations and a success toast.

Profile page: fix media names showing 'Unknown' in Ratings/Reviews/Activity (server now resolves item name/year/library status), star ratings now show an exact-value tooltip (e.g. 8/10 · 4/5), media cards/titles are clickable to open the item, and the header profile button moved next to the language button. Also adds clear startup logging for the duplicate-folder cleanup.

Fix duplicate plugin installs: on startup the plugin now removes older versioned folders that share its GUID (keeps only the running version), ending the 'two versions installed / restart required' loop. GUID-scoped and strictly-older-only, so it never affects other plugins or the current version.

Performance: cache the 1.6MB ratings.js in-memory with ETag revalidation (browsers get a tiny 304 instead of re-downloading on every load/restart), load the 17 persisted data files in parallel at startup to cut boot/first-use latency, and remove a duplicate WebSocket service registration. No feature/data changes.

Fix: My Rating library sort - render sorted results into a plugin-owned grid (no longer fights Jellyfin's view, fixes page 2/3 jumping back to page 1), unified API auth so SortedLibrary accepts X-Emby-Token (fixes empty/no-items results), clearer empty-state messages
